commission.notes: 5% on all sales, no tiered structure detected

affiliate_program.shipping: Same business day on orders before 12:00 noon ET

creative_assets.notes: Program page states team is available to assist on additional marketing content needs; standard AvantLink creative tools available to approved affiliates

product_catalog.key_differentiator: Low-maintenance Gates Carbon belt drive (rust-free, grease-free) across all models
product_catalog.flagship_ebike: Priority Current Plus E-Bike (750W mid-drive motor, electronic shifting, 600% gear range)

afare_signals.commission_note: At category median (5%). Competitive but not a standout vs peers like Trek (4–8%) or Canyon (varies).
afare_signals.cookie_note: 21-day cookie is below the 30-day category median. Bicycles are considered-purchase items; longer cookies would better capture late-converting buyers.
afare_signals.aov_note: $550+ stated AOV is for standard bikes. E-bike AOV (Current Plus ~$3,299) would substantially lift EPC if promoted.
strengths: Unique low-maintenance positioning (belt drive) — easy content hook
Same-day shipping + 7-day support = strong conversion story
Financing via Affirm broadens accessible audience
Available on AvantLink — solid network with reliable tracking
weaknesses: 5% flat rate — no tiered or performance bonuses detected
Creative assets appear to be request-based rather than a self-serve library
E-bike high-AOV products ($3K+) not prominently featured in affiliate materials
No second network (e.g., ShareASale, Impact) — single-network risk
opportunities: Push e-bike content — 750W Current Plus at ~$3,299 yields ~$165 EPC at 5% vs ~$27 for a $550 city bike
Seasonal spring/summer launch content (April timing ideal)
Hotel/resort partnership angle for travel content creators
Target urban commuter and 'car-free lifestyle' content niches
threats: Rad Power Bikes and Aventon competitive on e-bike affiliate programs
Costco direct listing may divert affiliate conversions for price-sensitive buyers
No affiliate program changes detected — risk of stagnation if competitors raise rates

changes_since_last_audit.changes_detected: N/A — first audit on record for Priority Bicycles
changes_since_last_audit.program_stability: No rate changes, network changes, or program modifications detected in 2025–2026 search results. Program appears stable and unchanged from 2024 benchmarks.

recommended_actions: Flag e-bike AOV opportunity to LiveChannel vendors targeting content affiliates — $165 EPC is compelling
Recommend Priority Bicycles push AvantLink for cookie extension to 30 days (industry standard)
Monitor for any spring 2026 promotional offers that affiliates can activate
Cross-reference with Mac Fly AFARE and Mac Bee ACES scores for full Flywheel readiness picture
